notes: Corrections applied per reviewer: (1) rackUnits corrected from 2 to 1 — the CN-2400S is a 1U device per the manufacturer page. (2) AC input plug corrected from NEMA 5-15P to NEMA 5-20P — the unit ships with a captive 10 ft 3/12AWG cord terminating in a NEMA 5-20P plug and is rated 20A. All NEMA 5-20R outlets (unswitched and sequenced rear) use nema-5-15 as the closest available connector enum — this is a known enum limitation, not a factual error. The front convenience outlet is correctly NEMA 5-15R. Confidence raised to high: manufacturer page confirms all port details directly.

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Captive 10 ft cord, 3/12AWG, with NEMA 5-20P plug; device is rated 20A internally. nema-5-15 used as closest available connector enum — actual plug is NEMA 5-20P

ports.name: Unswitched Out 1-2
ports.note: 2x NEMA 5-20R unswitched outlets (1 duplex) on rear panel; nema-5-15 used as closest available connector enum — actual outlet is NEMA 5-20R

ports.name: Sequenced Out 1-2
ports.note: 2x NEMA 5-20R sequenced outlets (1 duplex, relay bank 1) on rear panel; nema-5-15 used as closest available connector enum — actual outlet is NEMA 5-20R

ports.name: Sequenced Out 3-4
ports.note: 2x NEMA 5-20R sequenced outlets (1 duplex, relay bank 2) on rear panel; nema-5-15 used as closest available connector enum — actual outlet is NEMA 5-20R

ports.name: Sequenced Out 5-6
ports.note: 2x NEMA 5-20R sequenced outlets (1 duplex, relay bank 3) on rear panel; nema-5-15 used as closest available connector enum — actual outlet is NEMA 5-20R

ports.name: Convenience Out
ports.note: 1x NEMA 5-15R unswitched outlet on front panel

ports.name: RS-232
ports.note: DB-9 connector; used for control system integration and optional BlueBOLT IP adaptor (BB-RS232)

ports.name: SmartSequencing Primary/Secondary
ports.note: Phoenix 4-pin screw-terminal connector; current-loop link between units (Primary OUT and Secondary IN)

ports.name: Remote Terminal
ports.note: Phoenix 4-pin screw-terminal connector; pins: +12V, STAT, REM, GND (Class 2 wiring)

ports.name: Force Off / Delay 3 Terminal
ports.note: Phoenix 5-pin screw-terminal connector; provides force-off and delay-3 control
